race.comment: MAEVE BRENNAN (3) resumed with a 9.3L fifth over 2414m at The Curragh four weeks ago. Selected to register a victory dropping in distance. OBSCENITY (15) is expected to play a leading role having finished 11.5L third contesting a 2313m handicap at Bellewstown on his first start of the year. GOTTA CATCH'EM ALL (11) recorded a 5.75L seventh competing in a 1609m handicap at Leopardstown making his seasonal reappearance. Strong claims of breaking through for his first win. JUSTENZIA (1) showed up well prior to finishing 1.75L second over 1911m at Gowran Park earlier this month. Warrants close consideration.
